title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 31
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost headphones.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your headphones? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched the computer room because I remembered using them there, then checked the changing rooms, but nobody had seen them. || Girl: So where did they turn up? || Boy: My sister has just messaged me. [1]They are on the back seat of my sister's car[/1]. I must have left them there. I will collect them at lunch because I need them for my music lesson. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where are the headphones?

options.A: On the back seat of a car

items.explanation: The speaker says the headphones are on the back seat of their sister's car.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you buy a birthday present for my brother? You said you were going into town after school. || Man: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a pair of trainers, because that seemed a safe choice. || Woman: What about some headphones? That might have been useful. || Man: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a football because he joined the school team last week[/2]. || Woman: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Man: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a football because he joined the school team last week.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the bookshop.
items.audio_script: Girl: What job are you doing at the bookshop this afternoon? I thought you were going to clean the windows. || Boy: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Girl: So will you carry boxes upstairs instead? || Boy: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to put new books on the shelves because the new delivery arrived this morning[/3]. || Girl: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Boy: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?

options.C: Put new books on the shelves

items.explanation: The speaker says they have to put new books on the shelves because the new delivery arrived this morning.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the hiking trip.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the hiking trip tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Man: I was going to pack a camera. Do we need that? || Woman: No, it is not on the list. || Man: Perhaps I should take a packed lunch instead. || Woman: You can, but [4]everyone must bring a raincoat because the forecast says there may be showers[/4]. || Man: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a raincoat because the forecast says there may be showers.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still planning to cycle by the river after school? I had already arranged everything for it. || Boy: I am afraid not. My bike chain has broken and the film begins too late, so that plan will not work now. || Girl: We could go to the cinema instead. Would that be easier? || Boy: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us go climbing indoors after school instead[/5]. || Girl: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Boy: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they go climbing indoors after school instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about photography club.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where photography club is being held today? I was going to the art room, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. An art exam is taking place and the library closes early, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the library. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the science lab this afternoon[/6]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will photography club be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the science lab.

items.context: You hear two people talking about something that is broken.
items.audio_script: Woman: I heard something is wrong, but I am not sure what it is. Is it the kettle? || Man: No, I checked that earlier and it is working normally. || Woman: Then perhaps it is the radio. || Man: I thought so too, but that is fine. [7]The problem is the toaster because it only burns one side of the bread[/7]. || Woman: We should tell someone before it gets worse or causes trouble. || Man: I agree. I will explain what happened when Dad gets home this evening and ask if it can be repaired soon.
items.question: Which thing is broken?
items.explanation: The speaker says the problem is the toaster because it only burns one side of the bread.
